summary: One Nation's stunning victory in the Farrer byelection has dominated Australian political coverage, with the party positioning itself for federal expansion and putting pressure on the Coalition over its handling of the result. The briefing reveals deep fractures in traditional political alignments, including reports that Nationals MPs are considering defection to Hanson's party. Beyond politics, a tech company founder has denied misconduct allegations while returning a major award, and federal budget announcements indicate additional infrastructure spending and higher gas tax revenue. Several tragic incidents including deaths from a Brisbane hotel fall and a rock fishing accident, alongside ongoing investigations into antisemitic incidents and alleged assaults, round out the day's serious news.
